ogTitle: Mollymook Beach vs Molong: Climate Safety

heading: Mollymook Beach vs Molong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mollymook Beach, New South Wales and Molong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Molong has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mollymook Beach (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mollymook Beach or Molong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mollymook Beach has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Molong scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mollymook Beach scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Molong scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mollymook Beach or Molong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Molong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
